entry.title: BPA SAQMMA09A0173 (M020) awarded to ACCENTURE NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: UPDATE CONTRACTING OFFICER POC AND REMOVE ALL SERVICE CONTRACT ACT (SCA) APPLICABILITY TO INCLUDE ALL RELATED SCA CLAUSES AND LANGUAGE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: ACCENTURE NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorLegalOrganizationName: ACCENTURE NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: ACCENTURE NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)
